name: GLEN BURNIE BANCORP
summary: Glen Burnie Bancorp is a Maryland bank holding company incorporated in 1990, owning The Bank of Glen Burnie, a commercial bank established in 1949. The Bank serves northern Anne Arundel County and surrounding areas, offering commercial and retail banking services including demand and time deposits, residential and commercial real estate loans, home equity lines of credit, construction loans, commercial loans, and indirect automobile lending through local dealer arrangements.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: First and second mortgage loans for residential real estate financing.

products.name: Home Equity Lines of Credit
products.description: Credit lines secured by home equity for consumer borrowers.

products.name: Commercial Mortgage Loans
products.description: Real estate financing for commercial properties.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Secured and unsecured lending to small and medium-sized businesses.

products.name: Indirect Automobile Loans
products.description: Consumer auto loans originated through arrangements with local automobile dealers.

products.name: Demand and Time Deposits
products.description: Retail and commercial deposit accounts including checking and time deposit products.

products.name: Construction Loans
products.description: Financing for land acquisition, development, and construction projects.

partnerships.description: Arrangements with local dealers to originate indirect automobile loans for consumers.
